title: Delicate Basque Vermicelli Pasta
description: A light, fermented tomato sauce coats pillowy vermicelli, creating a romantic and comforting Basque lunch that steams gently and feels like a Mediterranean breeze.
instructions: Bring water to a rolling boil in a large pot.
Add vermicelli pasta and cook for 5 minutes until just al dente.
Drain the pasta and rinse briefly with cold water to stop the cooking process.
While the pasta rests, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté minced garlic until fragrant.
Pour in fermented tomato puree, reduce heat, and let it simmer for 3 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika, salt, pepper, and lemon zest, cooking for an additional minute.
Add fresh basil leaves and toss together with the sauce to combine flavors.
Gently fold the steamed pasta into the sauce, allowing it to steam in the skillet for 2 minutes.
Serve immediately, garnishing with a few extra basil leaves if desired.
